{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "810b42c4",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Tutorial 55: Compare Calculations"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "8c31d3d1",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "The Tutorial demonstrates how to execute calculations for the **same model** in adjusted valve positions (Betriebszustandsdaten/Operational status data) and view the individual results."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "0beed02a",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Imports"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "de9f2add",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## SIR 3S Toolkit"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "a71a2b56",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### Regular Import/Init"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "f13370ef",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "SIR3S_SIRGRAF_DIR = r\"C:\\3S\\SIR 3S\\SirGraf-90-15-00-24_Quebec-Upd2\" #change to local path"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "c5be997b",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "from sir3stoolkit.core import wrapper"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "f1f7aaa6",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<module 'sir3stoolkit.core.wrapper' from 'C:\\\\Users\\\\aUsername\\\\3S\\\\sir3stoolkit\\\\src\\\\sir3stoolkit\\\\core\\\\wrapper.py'>"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 3,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "wrapper"
   ]
  },

   "metadata": {},

    {

     "output_type": "stream",

     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "wrapper.Initialize_Toolkit(SIR3S_SIRGRAF_DIR)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "e907a22c",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### Additional Import/Init for Dataframes class"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "6988815d",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "from sir3stoolkit.mantle.mantle import SIR3S_Model_Mantle"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "2c1f9159",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stderr",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "[2026-06-08 11:20:17,756] INFO in sir3stoolkit.core.wrapper: [Model Class Initialization] Initialization complete\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "s3s = SIR3S_Model_Mantle()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "359deefe",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Additional"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 7,
   "id": "2b047a85",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 8,
   "id": "1e2445af",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import networkx as nx"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "e61a092a",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Open Model"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "01bdb186",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "For the tutorial we have a simple hydraulic setup. A node with 4 t/h net outflow simulates some consumption. It is supplied by two pipes. The one from the left has a boundary pressure of 6 bar and a valve, we will control, the one from the right has a boundary pressure of 3 bar and no valve."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 9,
   "id": "84f74bd8",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stderr",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "[2026-06-08 11:20:33,712] INFO in sir3stoolkit.core.wrapper: Model is open for further operation\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "s3s.OpenModel(dbName=r\"Toolkit_Tutorial55_Model.db3\",\n",
    "              providerType=s3s.ProviderTypes.SQLite,\n",
    "              Mid=\"M-1-0-1\",\n",
    "              saveCurrentlyOpenModel=False,\n",
    "              namedInstance=\"\",\n",
    "              userID=\"\",\n",
    "              password=\"\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "6489461b",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "Valves:\n",
    "- 'bz.Indphi': -1: geschlossen, 0: offen, 1: Tabellenverweis, 2: variabel\n",
    "- 'bz.Phio': Stellung offen [%]\n",
    "- 'bz.Phig': Stellung geschlossen [%]\n",
    "- 'bz.Phisoll': Stellung variabel [%]\n",
    "- 'bz.Fkphi1',\n",
    "- 'bz.Tiv',\n",
    "- 'bz.IndPhiKonst',\n",
    "- 'bz.IndphiKlartext'"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "f10f0cc9",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Get Tk"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 10,
   "id": "e5272b92",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "valve = s3s.GetTksofElementType(s3s.ObjectTypes.Valve)[0]"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "a1f7c93d",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# 1. Scenario: Valve open (100%)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 11,
   "id": "71d2912b",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stderr",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "[2026-06-08 11:20:33,898] INFO in sir3stoolkit.core.wrapper: Value is set\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "s3s.SetValue(Tk=valve, propertyName=\"bz.Indphi\", Value=\"0\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 12,
   "id": "ee2f5121",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stderr",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "[2026-06-08 11:20:38,894] INFO in sir3stoolkit.core.wrapper: Model Calculation is complete\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "s3s.ExecCalculation(True)"
   ]
  },

  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "fe2b4285",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Prep data"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 25,
   "id": "dc08a607",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "df_pipes = [df_pipes_1, df_pipes_2, df_pipes_3]"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 26,
   "id": "a2a8964b",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "df_nodes = [df_nodes_1, df_nodes_2, df_nodes_3]"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "eac5d051",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "We have to choose the timestamp for plotting, as we only consider static it is fairly simple."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 27,
   "id": "6ac26337",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "for df in df_pipes:\n",
    "    df[\"QMAV\"] = abs(df[\"QMAV\"].str[0])"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 28,
   "id": "d4cefd1e",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "for df in df_nodes:\n",
    "    df[\"P\"] = df[\"P\"].str[0]"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "3f648bbe",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# View Results"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "ada2467d",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Pressure Comparison"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 29,
   "id": "e1059117",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "def plot_Result_ncd(df_pipes, df_nodes, axTitle='ncd', valve_percentage=100):\n",
    "    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(16.54, 11.69))\n",
    "\n",
    "    # Nodes (size+color by pressure)\n",
    "    nodes_patches_1 = s3s.plot_node_layer(\n",
    "        ax=ax,\n",
    "        gdf=df_nodes,\n",
    "        attribute='P',\n",
    "        colors=['cyan', 'teal'],\n",
    "        marker_style='p',\n",
    "        marker_size_factor=5000,\n",
    "        size_vmin=0,\n",
    "        size_vmax=10,\n",
    "        color_vmin=0,\n",
    "        color_vmax=10,\n",
    "        legend_fmt='{:4.0f} bar',\n",
    "        legend_values=[0, 2, 4, 6],\n",
    "        zorder=3,\n",
    "        show_value_labels=True,\n",
    "        value_label_fontsize=15,\n",
    "        value_label_offset=(4, 30),\n",
    "        value_label_fmt=\"{:.2f} bar\",\n",
    "    )\n",
    "\n",
    "    # Pipes (width by DN, color by QMAV)\n",
    "    pipes_patches_2 = s3s.plot_pipe_layer(\n",
    "        ax=ax,\n",
    "        gdf=df_pipes,\n",
    "        color_mixing_col='QMAV',\n",
    "        width_scaling_col='DN',\n",
    "        colors=['darkgreen', 'magenta'],\n",
    "        legend_fmt='{:.0f} m3/h',\n",
    "        line_width_factor=25,\n",
    "        legend_values=[0, 4, 8, 12],\n",
    "        color_vmin=0,\n",
    "        color_vmax=12,\n",
    "        zorder=1,\n",
    "        show_value_labels=True,\n",
    "        value_label_fontsize=15,\n",
    "        value_label_offset=(0, 10),\n",
    "        value_label_fmt=\"{:.2f} m3/h\",\n",
    "    )\n",
    "\n",
    "    # Draw Valve\n",
    "    linewidth = 10 * (valve_percentage / 100.0) + 1\n",
    "    ax.plot([40, 80], [0, 0], color=\"black\", linestyle=\"-\", linewidth=linewidth, zorder=2)\n",
    "\n",
    "    # Combine handles\n",
    "    handles = []\n",
    "    for h in (nodes_patches_1, pipes_patches_2):\n",
    "        if h:\n",
    "            handles.extend(h)\n",
    "\n",
    "    # Deduplicate legend by label\n",
    "    if handles:\n",
    "        seen = set()\n",
    "        unique = []\n",
    "        for h in handles:\n",
    "            if h.get_label() not in seen:\n",
    "                unique.append(h)\n",
    "                seen.add(h.get_label())\n",
    "        ax.legend(handles=unique, loc='upper left')\n",
    "\n",
    "    ax.set_title(axTitle)\n",
    "    plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "    plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 30,
   "id": "02c0eda7",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stderr",

     "text": [
      "[2026-06-08 11:21:08,119] INFO in sir3stoolkit.mantle.plotting: [plot] Plotting nodes (size='None', color='None', attr='P')\n",
      "[2026-06-08 11:21:08,148] INFO in sir3stoolkit.mantle.plotting: [plot] Nodes: plotted 4 points.\n",
      "[2026-06-08 11:21:08,150] INFO in sir3stoolkit.mantle.plotting: [plot] Plotting pipes (width='DN', color='QMAV', attr='None')\n",
      "[2026-06-08 11:21:08,164] INFO in sir3stoolkit.mantle.plotting: [plot] Pipes: plotted 2 segments.\n"
     ]
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1654x1169 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "plot_Result_ncd(df_nodes=df_nodes_1, df_pipes=df_pipes_1, axTitle='Scenario 1: Valve open (100%)', valve_percentage=100)"
   ]
  },
  {

   "source": [
